name: fpl-skills
description: Flagship workflow plugin for the ForgePlan ecosystem. 29 engineering skills + dev-advisor agent + 5 hooks. v1.29.0: Sprint Z10 PRD-061 — /methodology-check meta-skill: 4-layer coverage report (S10/S11/S12/S13 + C4) for any artifact, read-only, score 0-2 per layer + aggregate percentage + action items. v1.28.1: Sprint Z9 PRD-060 — c4-diagram skill Dispatch mode section. v1.28.0: Sprint Z8 PRD-058 — OpenSpec S12 delta-spec mandatory at supersede. v1.27.0: Sprint Z5 PRD-056 — /decay-watch extended to 4 sources + NOTE-013. v1.26.0: Sprint Z2 PRD-053 — Evidence Decay enforcement. v1.25.0: Sprint Z1 PRD-052 — /decision skill + adr templates. v1.24.3: Sprint O PRD-041 — detect_link_footguns.sh.
